request_payload.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. The recent cyberattacks on our infrastructure prove we can't go it alone. Supporting our allies isn't just about them—it's about protecting our own families. Remember when the power grid in Texas was hit? That could've been much worse if we didn't have partners to share threat intel. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
